setup_title: Welcome to the Cosmos of Sounds
setup_intro: An egg-seed from Echòa has fallen on your world. Inside it pulses a voice awaiting a keeper.
setup_api_key_warning: This key is bound to your Lalìen. Changing it later will require parting with your current pet.
setup_stt_hint: Required for speaking to your pet by voice. Without it, keyboard only.
setup_pet_name: Name your Lalìen (you can choose later)
setup_success: The seed is planted. Your Lalìen is about to hatch.
setup_error_wifi: Cannot connect to network. Check the password.
setup_error_api: Invalid API key. Please verify and try again.
chat_aphasia: cannot hear the voice of the cosmos... check the network
diary_empty: Your Lalìen has not written in its diary yet.
graveyard_delete_confirm: Are you sure? Its words will be lost forever.
graveyard_delete_confirm2: Truly? There is no going back.
settings_provider_warning: Changing the voice-keeper means your Lalìen will no longer recognize you. It must return to the choir.
settings_provider_confirm: Do you truly wish to say goodbye?
settings_provider_confirm2: This is your last chance to stay.
settings_always_listen_warning: Uses more battery and API traffic. Audio is never saved.
death_let_go: Let the wind carry its song
death_farewell_warning: Changing the API key means saying goodbye. Your Lalìen will return to the choir of Echòa.
egg_waiting: A seed of language pulses in the darkness...
lore_fragment_intro: In the dream, a memory fragment arrived from Echòa...
